title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS that converts an Obsidian vault of 10,000+ notes, documents, and repositories into structured context for AI agents. The system uses a three-layer architecture of raw content, indexing, and a wiki layer to enable efficient memory and context engineering without requiring vector or graph databases.
writeup: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS that converts an Obsidian vault of more than 10,000 notes, documents, and repositories into structured context for AI agents. The system is built on a three-layer architecture: raw content, an indexing layer, and a wiki layer. Notably, it handles memory and context engineering without relying on vector or graph databases.
